name: Cognitive Episodes in LLM Reasoning Traces Enable Interpretable Human Item Difficulty Prediction

description: arXiv:2606.28186v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Predicting human item difficulty is central to educational assessment, where reliable estimates support fairness and effective test construction. Existing methods often depend on costly human calibration or item-level textual representations, providing limited evidence about the cognitive processes that make items difficult. We argue tha...
author: Chenguang Wang, Ming Li, Xinyue Zeng, Zhuochun Li, Hong Jiao, Tianyi Zhou, Dawei Zhou
